
# Scientific Theories of the Origin of Life

## Chapter Purpose

Review abiogenesis theories including RNA world, hydrothermal vents, metabolism-first models, autocatalytic systems, and LUCA.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
